mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount > 0 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount < 0 THEN ABS(t.amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth}

SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '미분류') AS category_name, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH curr AS ( SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '미분류') AS category_name, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY c.name ), prev AS ( SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '미분류') AS category_name, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{previousYearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY c.name ) SELECT COALESCE(curr.category_name, prev.category_name) AS category_name, COALESCE(curr.amount, 0) AS current_amount, COALESCE(prev.amount, 0) AS previous_amount, COALESCE(curr.amount, 0) - COALESCE(prev.amount, 0) AS diff_amount FROM curr FULL OUTER JOIN prev ON curr.category_name = prev.category_name ORDER BY current_amount DESC

SELECT (EXTRACT(DOW FROM t.tx_datetime)::int + 1) AS day_of_week, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM t.tx_datetime) ORDER BY day_of_week

SELECT ((EXTRACT(DAY FROM t.tx_datetime)::int - 1) / 7 + 1) AS week_of_month, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY ((EXTRACT(DAY FROM t.tx_datetime)::int - 1) / 7 + 1) ORDER BY week_of_month

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(t.merchant), ''), '미입력') AS merchant, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(t.merchant), ''), '미입력') ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.name AS category_name, cb.budget_amount AS budget_amount, COALESCE(act.amount, 0) AS actual_amount, GREATEST(COALESCE(act.amount, 0) - cb.budget_amount, 0) AS over_amount FROM projectdb.category_budgets cb JOIN projectdb.categories c ON cb.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.category_id, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0 GROUP BY t.category_id ) act ON cb.category_id = act.category_id WHERE cb.user_id = #{userId} AND cb.year_month = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY actual_amount DESC

SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '미분류') AS category_name, SUM(ABS(t.amount)) AS amount FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} AND t.amount < 0
AND c.name ILIKE '%' || #{categoryName} || '%'
GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount > 0 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.amount < 0 THEN ABS(t.amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count FROM projectdb.transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{previousYearMonth}

WITH cur AS ( SELECT category_id, SUM(ABS(amount)) AS amt FROM projectdb.transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND amount < 0 AND tx_datetime >= #{curStart} AND tx_datetime < #{curEnd} GROUP BY category_id ), prev AS ( SELECT category_id, SUM(ABS(amount)) AS amt FROM projectdb.transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND amount < 0 AND tx_datetime >= #{prevStart} AND tx_datetime < #{prevEnd} GROUP BY category_id ), all_ids AS ( SELECT category_id FROM cur UNION SELECT category_id FROM prev ) SELECT all_ids.category_id AS category_id, COALESCE(cat.name, '미분류') AS category_name, COALESCE(cur.amt, 0) AS current_amount, COALESCE(prev.amt, 0) AS baseline_amount, (COALESCE(cur.amt, 0) - COALESCE(prev.amt, 0)) AS delta_amount FROM all_ids LEFT JOIN cur ON (cur.category_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM all_ids.category_id) LEFT JOIN prev ON (prev.category_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM all_ids.category_id) LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories cat ON cat.category_id = all_ids.category_id ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(cur.amt, 0) - COALESCE(prev.amt, 0)) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
